TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Puljekuwan i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Puljekuwan. u kasalumaluma' nu Puljekuwan sa, 42 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 157 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 152 ku tademaw, pakalatu 97%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 5 ku tademaw, pakalatu 3%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 78%, Bunun 3%, zumazuma 17%.
S.PHON: pur~ɾjəkuwan i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu pur~ɾjəkuwan. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu pur~ɾjəkuwan sa, ** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, * ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, bunun *%, zumazuma **%.
S.FORM: Puljekuwan i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Puljekuwan. u kasalumaluma' nu Puljekuwan sa, 42 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 157 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 152 ku tademaw, pakalatu 97%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 5 ku tademaw, pakalatu 3%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 78%, Bunun 3%, zumazuma 17%.
S.PHON: pur~ɾjəkuwan i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu pur~ɾjəkuwan. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu pur~ɾjəkuwan sa, ** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, * ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, bunun *%, zumazuma **%.
